entry.title: Re: Bonus Assignment Statement-Adding Person ID and Prefe...

entry.title: Re: RAP Business Events with Advanced Event Mesh [2]: Creating custom business events
entry.content:
Hi @Padmini2709,

perhaps deep payloads are something for you? You can also set them up to have deep array structures.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/rap-business-events-with-advanced-event-mesh-3-creating-events-with-deep/ba-p/13914285

entry.title: some Inbound emails from clients are getting rejected from sales and service cloud v2
entry.content:
We have client emails being sent to a shared mailbox in Exchange Online and that is set up with an automatic forwarder to SAP - We have found, that some of the clients don't have proper DKIM, SPF, DMARC records configured and thus SAP is rejecting the forwarded messages. 

Has anyone else come across this and come up with a solution?

entry.title: Re: Reimagining digital learning as an integrated part of a Digital Adoption Platform with SAP &&&&
entry.content:
Hi Kristina! 

My Understanding is that SAP Enable Now will stay around (from a Producer) standpoint and SAP WalkMe will basically become the new SAP Companion. Is that true?

How would Simulations look in the future state? Would existing simulations be editable in SAP WalkMe? And what about existing content that is already in SAP Companion and linked in an SAP Instance? Would that have to be re-linked?

entry.title: Re: Add user who last updated order
entry.content:
Hello,

Yes, ou can get this information from the ORDR.UserSign2 field.

There you have the user that has updated the SalesOrder the last time. 

It relates with the OUSR table.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: How to auto define business place or remove business...

entry.title: Re: DCI cannot be set for the item.
entry.content: Can you please share the screenshot from the Status and PO history tab?

entry.title: Re: Walkthrough SAP Cloud ALM Process Authoring
entry.content:
Hi,

Thank you for your blog.

I wonder if you can help. We wish to be able to "Copy" a Solution Process Flow or Flow Diagram, and believe we should see the option to "Copy" (next to Detail) when going into Manage Scopes and viewing a specific scope item.

We do not see the Copy dropdown option next to Detail on top right of screen

 

In your blog above you mention that to be able to use edit mode for Process Authoring one of the two roles are required:-

Process Management Process Author or Cross Global Administrator

Maybe our issue is related to authorisation/ allocation of one of these roles.

Now, our issue is when we look under Manage Projects and Roles, we do not see either of the roles noted above.

Please can you help? Many thanks

Adrian

entry.title: Re: The two project control possibilities in SAP S/4HANA Cloud: Enterprise projects and professional
entry.content:
Hi Sven,

Thank you for clarification, it is really helpful.

I have a business case where several companies are working on same project. And moreover, company A provides some material to company B in the project context. I think scope item 4AU can help but it is not intended to handle stock transfer, only activities or expenses.

I tried to create intercompany stock transfer order with project assignment but this is vorbidden in Public Cloud.

Do you have any recommandation for that scenario ? Already faced this configuration.

Thanks for your support.

Gregory

entry.title: Re: Set up your SAP S/4HANA system for EAM Inspection Checklists

Hi Uwe,

Understood.. Thank you so much for the response.

 

Thanks,

Surya

entry.title: Re: New Resource-Related Intercompany Billing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi @varsha_chetanmanu 

Thank you for clarification, it is really helpful.

I have a business case where several companies are working on same project. And moreover, company A provides some material to company B in the project context. I think scope item 4AU can help but it is not intended to handle stock transfer, only activities or expenses.

I tried to create intercompany stock transfer order with project assignment but this is vorbidden in Public Cloud.

Do you have any recommandation for that scenario ? Already faced this configuration.

Thanks for your support.

Gregory

entry.title: Re: Copy ACTUALSQTYPRIORYEAR values are shifted by 10 weeks
entry.content:
Hi Bernd

We use technical week as our we map our Fiscal Year in IBP and we need to differentiate it from a calendar week. There are two specific reasons: a.- The period is a fiscal period, it does not necessarily end on the end of the month but the whole year follows a 4/4/5 weeks pattern per quarter. b.- The year ends on the 30th of September and we might that its a mid week day, in which case we have a classic IBP technical week.

I will follow your advice and use calendar week as a copy level and I will revert back with the results

Thanks again for your help

entry.title: Re: DRC - no data selected by "Switzerland VAT return (CH...
entry.content: Thanks for the feedback Patrick, reviewing the configuration you described, when I double click on the business function and click on the “Display Object List” icon I open the enhancements tree and see that the “%_EI_FIN_LOC_SRF_SWITCH_CHK” attribute is inactive, although the BF is active... can you confirm if your configuration is the same, I sent a private message with a print. Thank you very much for your help!

entry.title: Re: SAP EWM Addition to stock putaway strategy

entry.title: Mass programmatic deployment of Fiori Elements applications on S/4HANA 2021 On-Premise
entry.content:
Hello,

We are using XCO library to generate many RAP Business Object on S/4HANA 2021 On-Premise, with appropriate Fiori Elements annotations using OData V2 UI service binding.

The problem comes when we want to deploy these RAP BO/Applications.

Is there a way to deploy Fiori Elements applications on mass, programmatic, as a background job?

entry.title: Re: Automatically assignment of service Ticket to agents !!!!
entry.content: Were you able to achieve it using SDK development?

entry.title: Re: Solving RSA1 issue after BW Refresh
entry.content:
@Marian_Zeis, In BW system, At RSA1 Transaction Code we need to create source system like ECC, SRM.

Where BW system can replicate the data from that source system.

And after system refresh we need to recreate or modify and fix it all source system is defined as old system (The system that used as source system during system refresh).

I hope it helpful to you🙂.

entry.title: Re: New Resource-Related Intercompany Billing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi @Himani 

The resource-related intercompany billing does cost plus billing on top of the actual intercompany CO postings. Hence the value you see in screenshot is coming from the cost rate and ICO rate setup for the actual Intercompany CO postings. 

Varsha

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps Subscription Failed
entry.content: Hi

entry.title: Re: Asset Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502
entry.content: Seriously SAP? Nothing significant here

entry.title: Re: Join the Innovation Journey with SAP Enterprise Threat Detection, cloud edition
entry.content:
One year later, this article is as relevant as it was before! 
Meanwhile, two updates: 

1. We have released the long-awaited Test & Demonstration SKU 8018321, available to partners for a nominal fee! You can request a quote via you partner account manager.

2. The partner page has moved - it is now available  here: https://partneredge.sap.com/en/products/etd/about.html 

For questions get back to @ToKe and @Lingscheid. Looking forward to hearing from you!

entry.title: Re: ways to start as a Consultant
entry.content:
Thanks Omar.

I know now that you have a financial background, so you should look for SAP S4 HANA Finance.

Create a LinkedIn profile if you do not have already.

Develop relevant skills in SAP S4 HANA Finance 

  • https://www.sap-press.com/sap-s4hana-finance_5606/?utm_source=sappressblog&utm_medium=referral&utm_campaign=Blogs&utm_term=s4hanafinancepillar&utm_content=2339

You need to get involve in SAP Forums (SAP S4 HANA finance) and get recommendations.

Also get some training online and apply for the positions.

Once you get a project even a junior level, you will learn a lot.

Regards,

Syed

entry.title: Re: Add user who last updated order
entry.content:
Hi @jeroenw ,

In documents, the field UserSign represents who created it, whereas UserSign2, who's last updated it. You could use the latter to identify who has made the last change. You just need to join ORDR with OUSR to get the user code/name. See an example below:

SELECT
	DocNum
	, ousr.USER_CODE AS 'Updating User Code'
	, ousr.U_NAME AS 'Updating User Name'
FROM ORDR
	LEFT JOIN OUSR
		ON ordr.UserSign2 = ousr.USERID

 *** If this answer resolves your question, kindly consider marking it as accepted. This helps our community by highlighting useful solutions. Thank you! ***

BR,
Felipe

entry.title: Re: Update of an Entity does not update data after create...
entry.content:
After reading a lot of the MDK Help Guides I found the solution:

https://help.sap.com/doc/f53c64b93e5140918d676b927a3cd65b/Cloud/en-US/docs-en/guides/features/offline/common/handling-failed-requests/reverting-error-state.html

After reverting the errors in Error Archive I was able to send a new Change Set request to backend.

Without this procedure, the ChangeSet Fails because of dependent requests.

Error like: This request was not executed because it depended on request (N).

entry.title: Re: BAPI PO change - Custom fields modification
entry.content: I have same requirement .Could you please let me know how this issue was addressed

entry.title: Re: @sap/datasphere-cli: Getting Rid of Passcodes Thanks to OAuth Client Support
entry.content:
Hello,

When will the 2 legged authentication be available?
We are in a use case in which an external tool needs to trigger a task chain run in Datasphere.

3 legged auth is a no go for my use case as it needs to be developed in a cloud application, and the token expiration is more a limit than a feature.

Is there another way to run task chains from an external tool?

entry.title: Re: Defining Custom Subscription Parameters in Multitenant SAP BTP CF Applications
entry.content:
Hey @sven-leonhardt ,

I recently ran into some issues while setting up a new saas registry and it was due to how I had formatted the yaml file. It should now be updated with a form that works. 

In terms of enums, it should be possible to delivery using the following yaml:

 

        propagateParams: true
        paramsSchema: 
          schemas: 
            subscription:
              create:
                parameters:
                  $schema: 'http://json-schema.org/draft-04/schema#'
                  additionalProperties: false
                  _show_form_view: true
                  type: 'object'
                  properties:
                    databaseId:
                      type: 'string'
                      title: 'SAP HANA Cloud Database ID'
                      description: 'Enter SAP HANA Cloud Database ID'
                      enum:
                        - 'hana-service'
                        - 'hana-cloud'

 

One last note is the inclusion of the propagateParams flag. I'm not actually sure what type of impact is has but I found it in some docs here : https://github.com/SAP-samples/btp-cap-multitenant-saas/tree/main/docu/4-expert/-CloudFoundry-/multiple-hana-cloud#1-setup-steps

(though I have a suspicion that this blog post may have inspired the docs if I look at timestamps and the specific wording of titles and descriptions)

 

Hope this helps!

Thanks,

Brian

entry.title: Re: Problem updating entity after sync
entry.content:
I found a workaround and now I'm able to save correctly the Order to backend.

The workaround implies a programmatically simulation of change attribute in the Header Entity.

If I send a request without change attributes in Header Entity, the entire Order is stored in Offline Store and appears not synced (@SAP.isLocal = true).

I do not understand why this happens, but I would really like to understand it.

Because for SAP Cloud Private Edition you must use SSAM

sap-maintenance-assistant-2302-now-available-what-s-new

entry.title: Re: Salient Features of Workflow in SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi,

Thank you for such detailed explanation. It was quite useful.

We have a requirement wherein we have to enable a field for HR people and that should be editable from the get go ie as soon as the employee raises a resignation. Also that field alone should be editable for the HR irrespective of the workflow step and should be allowed to update the field within 48 hrs of employee raising the resignation and need not wait until the workflow reaches them after step1 and Step2 approval which approx would be 45 days from the date of resignation. Is there a possibility of creating such a field in MDF and allowing the workflow participant to edit from the beginning if even if they are at step 3 of the workflow approval process? Kindly share ur inputs.

entry.title: Global value in sap mdg fpm : mv_fpm_edit_mode
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a doubt as below.

For example, we have some 5 custom blocks in sap mdg for customer.

When we do the global edit in the OVP page of sap mdg for customer, parameter mv_fpm_edit_mode holds value to 'E' only to few blocks in get_data...and not for all the blocks.

Do i need to do some settings so that the parameter mv_fpm_edit_mode  holds as 'E' whenever user does the global edit.

Kindly suggest me the same. thanks.

Regards,

Karthik S

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere – How-To integrate Open SQL Procedures in a Task Chain
entry.content:
I whould really like to run a task chain from an OpenSQL procedure instead...

This could open datasphere to be orchestrated by another software

entry.title: Re: Maximum double value in report appears to be 1.7E306...
entry.content:
Hello,

I can confirm this is not working as expected.

I hit the F1 key (CR Help) and searched on the EXP function and found this noted limitation:

Comments

  • This function is designed to work like the Visual Basic function of the same name.

  • Numeric overflow occurs if the given number argument is larger than approximately 705.

It appears to be a known limitation, likely due to the legacy C++ limitation.

Don

entry.title: Re: Duplicate field is appearing in the Custom Object wit...
entry.content: Thank you Kayla. However, we havent maintained in the default screen UI and none of the groups are empty. Yet, when we receive teh data, one additional field is showing up only in the UI. Reports and all are working correct except for the UI. Even in Manage Data we are getting that duplicate field.

entry.title: Short Dump Business function MDG_ERP_CUSTOMER_12 must be active
entry.content:
Hi,

I’m frequently encountering a short dump when trying to open the Manage Business Partner app. Strangely, the app sometimes works, but other times it crashes.

I attempted to activate the relevant business function, but I received a message stating that activation is not needed.

Has anyone else experienced a similar issue? Any insights would be greatly appreciated.

S4HANA ON PREMISE 2023 02 (10/2024) .

entry.title: Re: Printing duplex with GraphicLocationFormula
entry.content:
The Craxdrt.dll is legacy COM SDK and has not been supported since CR 11.5.

Does it work when using Crystal Reports Designer? You can get CR 2020 trial version from here:

https://www.sap.com/products/technology-platform/crystal-reports.html

On the CR for VS .NET site you can get the latest CR for VS .NET installer for VS 2010->2022:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354091173.html

On that page is a printer test app I wrote, see if that works.

If it's still an issue then I'll let R&D know and see if they can fix the issue:

Related Documents

Crystal Reports for Visual Studio Licensing

Getting started and moving ahead with Crystal Reports .NET applications

See this Blog for instructions upgrading your existing project to the latest SP

See this blog on how to use CR 2020 Export to XLXS page formats:

How to use the new CR 2020 export to Microsoft Excel(XLXS) in Visual Studio .NET code (new)

how-to-parameters-in-crystal-reports-for-visual-studio-net

Printing Crystal Reports in .NET

SAP Crystal Reports for Visual Studio Installation Guide ( SP 21 and above)

Note: no option to get the legacy COM dll updated now, only option is to upgrade to .NET, Java or RESTful SDK's.

entry.title: Charts in Report stories are not getting refreshed with the latest data when executed
entry.content:
Hi,

In report stories, we have few charts created which are not getting refreshed upon each run. The user runs the report atleast 3-4 times in a day and compares the same with the active employee list which is also run simultaneously. However, the data is not getting updated real time even though the Data base is SF only and reports are created within SF. Can anyone tell if you have faced such a problem and is there any workaround? Secondly, how do we overcome such a problem. This dashboard kind of report is created for the CXO level and we cannot provide them to choose the date every time they run teh report. Its expected to show the latest data as we are fetching the data directly from SF.

Kindly help in this regard.

Regards,

Nagavalli B N

entry.title: Re: My app can not export PDF anymore after Windows 11 update (24H2 - 26.100.3037)
entry.content: No, VB 6 I dont' recall supported .NET, time to upgrade to VS 2010->2022. If it did then CR for VS won't install to it because SAP does not support VB 6 any more. The Installer looks for VS 2010->2022.

entry.title: How can we customize/override DateAdapter of de.hybris.platform.webservicescommons.jaxb.adapters?
entry.content:
Hi All,

OOTB DateAdapter class from webservicescommons has UTC time zone hardcoded. We need to make it system default time, but tried multiple ways to override the Adapter but nothing. 

de.hybris.platform.webservicescommons.jaxb.adapters.DateAdapter 

Can some suggest if there is any way we can override DateAdapter? There is one custom TimeZoneDateAdapter, we followed that process also to define our customer Date Adapter, but it didn't work.

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: EWM : Adding new field to the field catalog in Handling units customizing

Ex Field 'PHU_VSBED' Value 'A'
Field 'PHU_VSBED' Value 'B'


Thank You.

entry.title: Upload of supplement and transfer budget
entry.content:
We would like to know how to upload supplement and transfer budget in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Upload of supplement and transfer budget
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,


In order to upload budgets in your system, you can make use of "Import Financial Plan Data" app, where you will be able to upload a template with all required fields in a CSV file to your system.

Import Financial Plan Data


Best Regards,
SAP Support

Re: Import substances of own "regulatory lists" to SAP S/...

Hello

not sure if i understood your topic correct.. therefore i try to answer at my  best

1.) the answer might depend a little bit on software used (which version "on premise" and / or which version "on cloud")

2.) but in principle there is an interface to get "updates" if system set up is correct

 

may be this https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/setting-up-the-regulatory-content-service-for-product-compliance/ba-p/13580873

might help for your question

may be check as well: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/latest-content-updates-for-product-compliance-and-more/ba-p/13589382

C.B.

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to put an editor lock to ATC Check variant in ATC -> Manage Variants?
entry.content: Did you check the authorizations? (STAUTHTRACE)

entry.title: Re: SAP RISE - Key Learnings
entry.content:
@AndySilvey yes, you´re right, sorry about that
i think i use to much social media and see in every praise a AI comment

Thank you for being so active in the community!

entry.title: Why the code added inside a CMS Paragraph Component from SmartEdit disappears after saving it
entry.content:
This unexpected behavior is all because of the property cms.components.allowUnsafeJavaScript that after SAP Commerce 1905.19 version it is set by default as false.

This property exists because SmartEdit uses the CKEditor as its editor for the paragraph component (text) type. The CKEditor automatically verifies the HTML and transforms the content automatically to the preferred form.

If you want to allow inline style, including linking to anchor in the text, in the CKEditor, set the value of cms.components.allowUnsafeJavaScript to true in the Hybris Administration Console, or in the local.properties or project.properties file. For example:

cms.components.allowUnsafeJavaScript=true

entry.title: Re: How to enable Scorm for Mobile SAP Successfactors App
entry.content: @HeenaG, in the content object, "Launch Method" tab, the "Enable Mobile Access" field is available.

entry.title: Re: Jobs posted to a specific brand is being displayed on...
entry.content:
Hi @mfpabon ,

As you may be aware, there is a known issue where jobs posted under specific brands are being displayed under the Main Brand.

To address this, we implemented a temporary workaround for our client by creating two distinct brands (Brand A and Brand B) and associating each job with its respective brand. As a result, we avoided using the main/default brand altogether.

While this solution has been effective in the short term, we acknowledge that it is not the most optimal approach, and ideally, we would prefer a more permanent solution that does not rely on bypassing the main/default brand.

Please let us know if there are any further steps we can take to resolve this issue.

Please let me know if any queries.

Thanks,

kr,

karthick.

entry.title: Re: Fields captured by third party content provider from LMS
entry.content: @Varsha27, please, check if the details of the Implementing Structured Content entry are useful. Otherwise, please, elaborate a little bit more on the situation.

entry.title: LMS Admin can't see some domains when creating Assignment Profile
entry.content:
Some admins have reported that they're having issues seeing certain domains when they're trying to create assignment profiles. We normally instruct our admins to create all Assignment Profiles with the top level domain (plus subdomains), to ensure the AP rules are not impeded by domain restrictions.  

However, we've had some instances where an admin reports that they can't add/choose that domain.

We'd like to make sure that the admins can see this domain to use for AP targeting, but do not want to give broad permission to this domain, as this is the top of our domain hierarchy.

entry.title: Call for Speakers (SIT DFW) - spring 2025
entry.content:
hello Dallas community,

hope everyone is having an ok-excellent beginning of 2025. @rileyrainey , @lingaiahvanam and I would like to ask our local community to see if anyone is interested in becoming a speaker for our first SAP Inside Track Dallas (DFW) some time in March (exact date TBD).

Some of the main topics and buzz words at the moment are related to LLM, Gen AI, and anything that can help with productivity, intelligent software and anything else in the latest trend. 

This event is open for anyone to attend, volunteer and share any knowledge. IF you're not in Dallas but would like to participate, please share any comments below.

entry.title: Re: Warehouse order still in process
entry.content:
Hello,

It was due to inconsistencies and can be corrected with check monitor - /SCWM/CHM_LOG.

I had this issue & rectified it following the SAP note 2383741.

 

Thanks & regards,

Sasikumar.

entry.title: Re: Which KPI's do you have in software development?
entry.content:
Hi @EnnoWulff ,

i see… yo, that’s a challenge. What about measuring certain KPIs at start of each customer project and at end and measure the improvements project/customer wise?

And ranges to keep are also an idea when it comes to process definitions.

PS: Dilbert has always the best answers 🤓

entry.title: Re: FlexibleColumnLayout: close detail page
entry.content:
By design, the Flexible column layout does not support closing the second column once opened. 

As this functionality is currently not available in MDK standard control, I would suggest you to open a feature request here. We'll review it based on its priority.

entry.title: Amortization Down Payment
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Does anyone know why when we post an invoice with a down payment, it supposed to be cleared at PO but in FBL1N still shows two open items created in automatic process. how can we clear this?

I appreciate your help.

thanks.

entry.title: I don't see contracts in the Manage condition contract sales rabate app
entry.content:
Hi people,

I am having a problem with the manage condition contracts app. Although i have active sales rebate contracts, they do not appear in the list. I tried using the different filters but I can't see them. do you know if I have to make any configuration or what could be causing this problem? can you help me with this?thanks a lot! 

SAP S/4HANA SD (Sales and Distribution) SAP Fiori

entry.title: Re: End to End Designing the Multilevel Hierarchy in Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello Kartheek,

many thanks for your blogg and the clear steps you provided with.

May I ask how to overcome the issue while importing the CDS view "IPRFTCTRHNODE"?

On my side I face this error:

IPRFTCTRHNODE errorgetCSNDefinition: Mandatory selection fields not supported

As you do not use a copied version of the view above, like suggested in note "3430089" as workaround (Create a copy and adjust the CDS View to remove or set fixed selection fields, to then overcome this limitation) did you change the standard view?

Many thanks for taking some time to respond.

entry.title: Re: SAP RISE - Key Learnings

thanks, the main thing is to help and encourage people to contribute useful material, and this blog is really useful.

Regarding the GenAI, I take that as a compliment :-))

All the best,

Andy.

entry.title: ABAP RAP: Getting Language Dependend Text Through Text Associations
entry.content:
Concept of language-dependent text elements

Master data tables contain business objects with a unique ID. To extend master data with language dependent text, a 1..n mapping to the text elements is required. The text element table contains the same key as the master data table. The additional key field language of type spras must be added for language dependent text

Following Example illustrate how to deal with language depended Text in ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model (RAP)

  • Create Master Data Table "ZBOOKSTATUS"

 

define table zbookstaus {
  key client         : mandt not null;
  key booking_status : /dmo/booking_status not null;
}​

 

  • Create Status Text Table ZBBOKSTATUS_T

 

define table zbookstaus_t {
  key client         : mandt not null;
  @AbapCatalog.foreignKey.keyType : #TEXT_KEY
  @AbapCatalog.foreignKey.screenCheck : false
  key booking_status : /dmo/booking_status not null
    with foreign key [0..*,1] zbookstaus
      where client = zbookstaus_t.client
        and booking_status = zbookstaus_t.booking_status;
  @AbapCatalog.textLanguage
  key language       : spras not null;
  text               : text not null;
}​

 

  • Populate Tables with Data

  • Create Status Text CDS View

 

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Buchungsstatus'
@Search.searchable: true

define view entity ZI_BOOKSTATUS_T
  as select from zbookstaus_t
{
       @ObjectModel.text.element: ['Text']
  key  booking_status as BookingStatus,
       @Semantics.language: true
  key  language       as Language,
       .defaultSearchElement: true
       .fuzzinessThreshold: 0.5
       @Semantics.text: true
       text           as Text
}​​

 

  • Create Status CDS View with Text assoziation

 

@AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory: [#NONE]
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Buchungsstatus'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true
@Search.searchable: true

define view entity ZI_BOOKSTATUS
  as select from zbookstaus
  association [1..*] to ZI_BOOKSTATUS_T  as _Text 
        on $projection.BookingStatus = _Text.BookingStatus
{
      .textArrangement: #TEXT_FIRST
      @ObjectModel.text.association: '_Text'
      .lineItem: [{importance: #HIGH ,label: 'Staus', position: 10}]
      .defaultSearchElement: true
  key  booking_status as BookingStatus,
       _Text
}​​

 

  • Define Service Definition

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Buchungsstatus'
define service ZUI_BOOKSTATUS {
  expose ZI_BOOKSTATUS;
}​​

 

  • Define Service Binding

  • Preview Service

  • Search "can"

  • Change sap-ui-language to "DE"

 

Conclusion

ABAP RAP has a seamless integration of language dependent text elements.
There is no need to deal with session variables or create your own language restriction.

This article doesn't cover the concept of the projection view.
If you are interested in extending your scenario, please have a look to SAP Help  

I hope you enjoyed this article. To keep up to date, please refer to the SAP SAP Help documentation.or enjoy the SAP Community

entry.title: Hello Everyone
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

My name is Tamar Paine (Chicago,IL), and I’m excited to be a part of this SAP Learning Community! A little about myself: I was born and raised in Chicago illinois. Fun fact about me, I have 5 degrees and 5 technical certifications and SAP will make 6. I started my tech journey in 2019 as a OPM SFS National Science Foundation cybercorp Scholar, where the government paid for 2 years of college and the payback was 2 years of service. I also worked for Accenture (the top tech consulting firm in the nation lol) for a year as a Cybersecurity Analyst and started my own consulting firm Veola Tech Solutions LLC in 2021. I actively work for the Department of Veteran Affairs and hold a public trust clearance. Please feel free to reach out to me for information at any time, I love to be of service.

I’m currently certified as a SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, and I’m really looking forward to expanding my knowledge in the finance area aka FICO.

I’m particularly excited about obtaining this certification because my passion for technology drives me. Im looking to expand my knowledge on a process that is heavily needed and rarely known.

I’m also open to connecting with others who are interested in cybersecurity, cloud technologies, finance, and overall networking. I love people from all walks of life and different backgrounds. A good coffee chat does wonders.

Looking forward to learning and growing with all of you!

Best regards,  

Tamar Paine  MBA

Cybersecurity Analyst

entry.title: Re: Can we control Custom Logic code using Sy-Tcode or Ap...
entry.content:
Hi shashankagg

Could you provide some more details or give an example what you are trying to do?

I am not sure what you mean by control custom logic?

The Custom Logic inapp BAdI depends on the context, but it can work with the importing parameters. 

You can also do a select statement from a CDS View, for example,

then you can only output what is available in the chaning parameters.

Thank you

Jerry

entry.title: E-Verify Reporting - find latest case status
entry.content:
Hi - 

I am looking to report on all employees who don't have at latest E-Verify case - their latest E-Verify should have a status of 'Employment Authorized'. We have scenarios where an employee will have had multiple E-Verify cases submitted but I need a Story report that will evaluate all of the cases submitted for an employee and tell me the status of the latest case that was submitted.

I cannot seem to determine how to compare multiple rows of data and only keep the row that has the latest date (Case Closure Date).

Is it possible to do this in a Story report?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: MDK - pageProxy getActionBar not working on Android
entry.content: What MDK client version are you using on the Android device?

entry.title: Re: Is SAP Enable Now the best solution for SAP implement...
entry.content:
Hi Nuno,

SAP does not have another solution for producing tutorials and user guides.  Enable Now is definitely capable of producing these types of resources.  There are actually two major components to the Enable Now solutions:

1. Production of digital learning content such as Simulations and eLearning courses.  This capability also allows you to generate user guides or to distribute the content electronically
2. In application delivery of the content.  In general, that means making the content available through SAP Companion in applications such as S/4HANA Public Cloud

The second of the Enable Now components will soon be superseded by the acquisition of WalkMe.  Enable Now customers can continue to use SAP Companion to deliver their content in application and at some point in the future these customers will be offered a migration path to WalkMe. 

WalkMe does not currently have a digital learning content solution - the functionality that you are asking about - however, a solution is currently under development.  Again, at some point in the future, SAP Enable Now customers will be offered a migration path to this solution.

For more information on the Enable Now and WalkMe solutions, refer to this post.

Hope that helps.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: 5D2-Transit Plant not coming in VA01 for Advance Inte...
entry.content:
Hi, you need to Assign a Transit Plant to a Company Code using transaction SM30 with the view V_T001_TRNSTPLNT, then fill code company and transit plant .

You can find more infomation about configuration in note 3192584.

Best regards

Yanina

entry.title: Re: Create Salesorder throw BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDATA2 USING EXTENSIOIN
entry.content: horrible

entry.title: Re: MDK - pageProxy getActionBar not working on Android
entry.content: MDKClient Version: 23.12.0-002

entry.title: Re: spring security intercept pattern override
entry.content: I‘m having the same problem. Did you solve your issue?

entry.title: Re: Generate Documentation in SAP Enable Now
entry.content:
Hi Heli,

The structure of the Hands on Guide template does put content into a table.  That table contains instructions in the left column and screenshots in the right column.  It is not possible to change the structure of the standard documentation, however, you could try other documentation styles to see if something fits your needs.

If I were trying to deliver something similar to your requirement I would try:

1. Adding the text that had to appear outside the table to the Description field of the Simulation and modifying the Documentation Settings to generate the Simulation Description before the Simulation Contents.  This would also mean turn off the Show in Documentation field for the Book Page inside the Simulation - the Documentation section of Properties

2. Using Documentation macros, e.g. the Description macro, to capture the text that had to be added to the documentation.  If you insert the text into a Documentation macro, such as the Description macro, and turn it on for the Hands on Guide documentation format, the contents of the macro will be generated into Hands On Guide documents at the point in the Simulation where the macro is located

The following image shows a Description Documentation macro embedded into a Simulation and the second image shows the results of the macro in the Hands On Guide:

 

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: MDK - pageProxy getActionBar not working on Android
entry.content: The getActionBar method was added as part of the action bar redesign in MDK 24.11.0 which explains why the web is working and Android isn't.  Please upgrade your android client to MDK 24.11.2 and try again.

entry.title: Re: Adopting General Display Name
entry.content:
Hello Harvey,

We currently capture attributes " First Name, Middle Name, Last Name, Preferred First Name & Preferred Last Name".

Is there a way to configure DISPLAY NAME with combination " Preferred First Name, Middle Name, Preferred Last Name"

If Preferred First Name is empty, consider First Name

If Middle Name is empty, should ignore.

If Preferred Last Name is empty, consider Last Name.

please advise if that's feasible.

Best Regards,

Murali.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps How to save data in draft after button...

entry.title: Re: How to Start with Custom Situations: Detailed Design of Your Use Case (2/4)
entry.content:
Dear Angelika,

 

thanks for all your blogs about custom situation handling. I have one question that I couldnt solve so far. How to set conditions if I want to have notification for simple change.

 

Simple case. I want to get situation for every change of purchasing group on PO. I can fill the condition for purchasing group with 002 and I get situation for every change to purchasing group 002. But I would like to get nofiticiation for every change of purchasing group on any purchase order. Or really similar case. I would like get situation for any change of delivery date on purchase order item. Not only for example 30 days forward but any. 

 

What should be in the condition to have this setup??

 

Thanks a lot in advance for your clarification!

 

Michal

entry.title: Re: Rejected PO with reference to Contract is visible as...
entry.content: Thanks a lot we will use this approach!

entry.title: Re: In SAP CPI B2B I am getting error "cannot be imported...
entry.content:
If MIG is existing in your Quality system, check that the new MIG from Development is:
1. Active
2. Next version.

If version has been skipped, remove the MIG in quality then import the latest version. 
Update your agreements accordingly.

entry.title: Re: International Editable SALV Day 2025...

entry.title: Syntax error in program SAPLSCWE Running t-code SNOTE
entry.content:
After implemented the OSNOTE on SNOTE:

1668882 Por favor, instale para mantener Note Assistant actualizado
2869143 Por favor, instale para asegurar la descarga correcta de las pistas
3093855 Por favor, instale para mantener Note Assistant actualizado

The program SNOTE was dump with the following message:

Error in the ABAP application program.

The current ABAP program "SAPLSCWP" had to be terminated because it found a
statement that could not be executed.
In include "CL_SCWN_NOTE_SAR_FILE_N=======CU ", in line 32 of program
"SAPLSCWE ", the following syntax errors
have occurred:
Type "CWB_T_NOTE_DWLD_HTML_RESP" is unknown.

 


Author and last person to change the include are:
Author SAP
Last changed by "CK_STARTUP "

 

Help with solve this issue on SAP S4 2022 DEV

entry.title: Sending email triggers a sales order re-transfer to S4
entry.content:
Hello all,

We have a scenario where users can email sales order data to the customer from Sales Order TI->Actions->Send E-Mail option. 

When a user sends an email from a sales order that has already been transferred to S4 and confirmed with a sales order number, the system is again triggering a "transfer" to S4.

Why would the system think there is a change to the order, when only an email is sent out of the order. 

Is there a way to stop this? I did not find any enhancement (BADI) options for this. 

thanks in advance. 

Mayna

entry.title: What is Salty Coupon Code 2025? “GET100”
entry.content:
Here is your Salty Coupon code GET100, by applying this code you can get Rs.100 off in jewelleries on Salty. On Salty you can get the latest collection of jewelleries which you will love to wear. It has the best trending collection of jewelleries to wear on different functions. You can get your matching jewelleries according to the dress you want to earn on any function. Also the products of Salty are really comfortable to wear on.

Salty Coupon Code 2025

 

App Name

Salty

Salty Coupon Code 2025

GET100

Discount

Flat Rs 100 OFF

 

Salty Coupon Code

GET100 is your coupon code for Salty. By applying this code at the time of purchasing products you can get Rs 100 off on your product you are ordering. Create your account now on Salty and checkout the recent new trendy collection of Salty.

How to apply Salty Coupon Code?

  1. First of all you need to download the Salty app or visit their official website.
  2. Create your account by entering the details required.
  3. Browse for the product you desire for.
  4. Add the product in your cart.
  5. Apply the coupon code “GET100”.
  6. That’s it, you will get the product at less price.

About Salty

Salty is a jewelry selling company which has a really beautiful and trending collection of jewelry and that also in less price. Salty’s jewelleries are comfortable to wear in any functions or in the office with casual wear. You can find jewelry according to your choice and also you can get jewelry by matching it with your outfit. You can get products here in the most affordable prices in comparison to other jewelry selling companies. Also after applying our given coupon code above you can get some off in the products.

entry.title: Re: Expert Talk: Inspection Checklist in Maintenance Management – SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition
entry.content:
Hello @Gerhard_Welker 

Thanks for sharing very well content.

In S/4 S/4HANA 2022 , we had to implemented inspection checklist from the scratch :  Order type YA07 without  phase model and SAP GUI. 

In SSAM 2310 we had to config phase model (for reactive and proactive) and no phase model (for inspection checklist).

From now , with inspection checklist with phase model the user expierence will be unique (SAP Fiori). Also SSAM integration would be effortless (only phase model configuration) 

I was wonder if there is planned date for the Inpection checklist Scope Item in SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Cloud Private Edition?. 

Best regards

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Salvador 2025

entry.title: What is MyFab11 Referral Code? RND100
entry.content:
Myfab11 referral code is RND100. Using this code users will be able to get a Rs.100 sign up bonus and can also share referral codes with friends to earn Rs.100.

Myfab11 offers Sports Game formats for cricket, football games, among others, through the Platform. If you want to win, you need to create a fantasy team and join the grand leagues, create multiple teams to shine your fantasy team in the top. 

Join regularly one day you will be on top of the table. Now Google has given permission to add fantasy apps in the play store, you can download from play store and copy refer code from here to get Rs.100.

What is Myfab11 app Referral Code?

RND100 is Myfab11 app referral code. By applying referral code you will get the best signup bonus of Rs.100. You can earn upto Rs.8000 on sharing your referral code with your friends.

Myfab11 Referral Code 2024

Myfab11 Referral Code

RND100

Signup Rewards    

Rs.100

App Name

Myfab11

Referral Code  

RND100

Refer and Earn

Rs.100

About Myfab11

MyFab11 is a fantasy sports platform based in India that allows users to create their own virtual teams and compete against others in various sports, including cricket, football, and kabaddi. Users can use their knowledge of the sport to select players and create a virtual team, earning points based on the actual performance of their chosen players in real matches.

 

MyFab11 offers various features such as live score updates, player statistics, and cash prizes for winners. Users can join contests for a fee and compete with other users to win cash prizes based on their team's performance.

How to Sign on Myfab11 & Get Referral Bonus

  • Go to the MyFab11 website or download the MyFab11 app from the Google Play Store or Apple App Store.
  • Click on the "Register" or "Sign up" button on the home page.
  • Enter your mobile number, email address, and create a password.
  • Enter the referral code if you have any, and click on "Register."
  • Verify your mobile number by entering the OTP (One-Time Password) that you received on your mobile number.
  • You can now complete your profile by providing additional details like your name, date of birth, and state of residence.
  • Once you've completed your profile, you can start creating your virtual teams and participating in contests.

It's important to note that MyFab11 requires users to be at least 18 years old to sign up and participate in contests. Additionally, you may need to verify your identity and provide additional information to withdraw winnings from your account.

How to Earn Upto Rs.8000 by Sharing Myfab11 referral code

  • Open the MyFab11 app or website and log in to your account.
  • Click on the "More" option from the bottom menu and select "Refer & Earn."
  • You will see your referral code and referral link on this page.
  • Share your referral code or link with your friends through various social media platforms like WhatsApp, Facebook, Twitter, etc.
  • When your friend signs up using your referral code or link, they will receive a cash bonus in their MyFab11 account.
  • You will also receive a cash bonus in your MyFab11 account once your referred friend verifies their account and completes their first deposit on the platform.

How to Complete KYC in Myfab11

  • Open the MyFab11 app or website and log in to your account.
  • Click on the "More" option from the bottom menu and select "Verification."
  • Click on "Complete KYC" and select the type of ID proof you want to upload. You can choose from Aadhaar card, PAN card, or Voter ID card.
  • Enter the details of the ID proof you have selected, such as the ID number, name, and date of birth, and upload a clear scanned copy or picture of the ID proof.
  • Verify your mobile number by entering the OTP (One-Time Password) that you received on your mobile number.
  • Once you have uploaded the ID proof, the MyFab11 team will verify it, which may take up to 24-48 hours.
  • You will receive a notification on your registered email or mobile number once your KYC is verified.

It's important to note that completing KYC is mandatory to withdraw winnings from your MyFab11 account.

How to Withdraw Winnings from Myfab11

  • Log in to your MyFab11 account on the app or website.
  • Click on the "Wallet" icon from the bottom menu and select "Withdraw."
  • Enter the amount you want to withdraw and select your preferred withdrawal method. MyFab11 offers several withdrawal options such as, Bank Transfer, or UPI.
  • If you have not completed your KYC, you will be prompted to complete it before you can withdraw your winnings.
  • Confirm your withdrawal request and wait for the MyFab11 team to process it. The processing time may vary depending on the withdrawal method you have chosen.
  • Once your withdrawal request is processed, you will receive a confirmation message and your winnings will be credited to your selected withdrawal method.

 

Conclusion

So, this is all about the Myfab11 app Referral Code which is “RND100”. Users can easily create an account on the Myfab11 platform and can get a Rs.100 sign up bonus. Also refer to your friends to earn upto Rs.8000.

entry.title: SET UP PRIMARY FINANCE SETTINGS IN SAP CBC (Central Business Configuration)
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

We would like to ask regarding the fiscal year variant maintained in the CBC while setting up the Primary Finance Settings, since the set up cannot be undone unless the system is reprovisioned.
  1. Is it right to use the K4 as the fiscal year variant in the Primary Finance Settings activity and use the non-leading ledgers (such as 2L) with different fiscal year variant, for example SZ-Configurable template variant, for reporting purposes? 
     
  2. What will you recommend for schools as an industry with varying fiscal or academic year?
    Example: 
    This year, the academic year is August 2025 to July 2026, but it is possible that the next academic year will be changed to June to May. 
  3. What is the use of Fiscal year variant "SZ" - Configurable template variant and is it modifiable?

entry.title: Re: Rounding Discrepancy for Goal Results Payout Amount –...
entry.content:
Hi @Ravi14, it should be possible with custom design, can you please document what you have tried to far ? If you look at the design of this blog, you can bring currency code into each section details and build if-then rules accordingly.

https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-sap/variable-pay-custom-gates-with-cross-section-impact/ba-p/14005986 

All the best, Xavier

entry.title: Build Error
entry.content:
Hello

I am not sure if there is a particular area where I can research this.  Please let me know if there is; but this is an error I am getting on APK build.

AB version: 3.11.0
COMMAND:

USER_METERING_ENABLED=true SHOW_SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION=false SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION_DISMISSIBLE=true NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=16000 --no-experimental-global-navigator npxrnv repackage-android -p android -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --packageManager yarn --offline --templates-path /orchestra-cache/4.12.192/ejected_templates

FAILED with ERROR:

Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv repackage-android -p android -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --packageManager yarn --offline --templates-path /orchestra-cache/4.12.192/ejected_templates

entry.title: Creating a geomap widget in SAC from a live data model from PaPM
entry.content:
Hello folks,

I'm triying to create a Geomap (I'm skipping the steps to create the story's widget) in SAC while using a live data model to PaPM. But there's little or no information/documentation available to follow the steps in order to create the "geodimension" to make the geomap widget. 

However, there is this link (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/f7f432923cd9495bb5c98d5cdd667663.html)  where explains that IT'S possible to create a "geodimension" with a Hana Calculation View using a live connetion. But the problem lies that the client only has PaPM as a source data, no Hana Studio is available. 

Is there any documentation or knows the proper steps to create the "geodimension" in order to add the geomap widget. 

 

Thanks in advance
